changeSet.author: danikanov
changeSet.sql:
create or replace view config.config as WITH robots_properties AS ( SELECT ((((('robots.'::text || (robots.access_tool)::text) || '.'::text) || (robots.name)::text) || '.'::text) || (robot_props.key)::text) AS key, robot_props.value, robots_configurations.configuration_id FROM (((config.robots robots JOIN config.robots_properties robot_props ON ((robots.id = robot_props.robot_id))) JOIN config.robots_configurations ON ((robots.id = robots_configurations.robot_id))) JOIN config.configurations ON (((robots_configurations.configuration_id = configurations.id) AND ((configurations.application)::text = 'executor'::text)))) UNION SELECT ('access-tools.'::text || (robots.name)::text) AS key, robots.access_tool AS value, robots_configurations.configuration_id FROM ((config.robots robots JOIN config.robots_configurations ON ((robots.id = robots_configurations.robot_id))) JOIN config.configurations ON (((robots_configurations.configuration_id = configurations.id) AND ((configurations.application)::text = 'ppm'::text)))) UNION SELECT ((('processing-times.'::text || (robots.name)::text) || '.'::text) || times.check_method) AS key, (times.processing_time)::text AS value, robots_configurations.configuration_id FROM (((config.robots robots JOIN config.robots_configurations ON ((robots.id = robots_configurations.robot_id))) JOIN config.configurations ON (((robots_configurations.configuration_id = configurations.id) AND ((configurations.application)::text = 'ppm'::text)))) JOIN config.processing_times times ON ((robots.id = times.robot_id)))
UNION SELECT ((('robots-sla.'::text || LOWER(sla.sla_type) || '.'::text || (robots.name)::text) || '.'::text) || LOWER(sla.sla_period)) AS key, (sla.check_unit_value)::text AS value, robots_configurations.configuration_id FROM config.robots robots JOIN config.robots_configurations ON (robots.id = robots_configurations.robot_id) JOIN config.configurations ON (robots_configurations.configuration_id = configurations.id AND configurations.application::text = 'ppm'::text) JOIN config.robots_sla sla ON robots.id = sla.robot_id ) SELECT conf.application, conf.profile, conf.label, g_props.key, g_props.value FROM (config.configurations conf JOIN config.global_properties g_props ON ((conf.id = g_props.configuration_id))) UNION SELECT conf.application, conf.profile, conf.label, robots_properties.key, robots_properties.value FROM (config.configurations conf JOIN robots_properties ON ((conf.id = robots_properties.configuration_id)));
changeSet.rollback: create or replace view config.config as with robots_properties as( select 'robots.' || robots.access_tool || '.' || robots.name || '.' || robot_props.key "key", robot_props.value "value", robots_configurations.configuration_id configuration_id from config.robots robots join config.robots_properties robot_props on robots.id = robot_props.robot_id join config.robots_configurations on robots.id = robots_configurations.robot_id join config.configurations on robots_configurations.configuration_id = configurations.id and configurations.application = 'executor' union select 'access-tools.' || robots.name "key", robots.access_tool "value", robots_configurations.configuration_id configuration_id from config.robots robots join config.robots_configurations on robots.id = robots_configurations.robot_id join config.configurations on robots_configurations.configuration_id = configurations.id and configurations.application = 'ppm' union select 'processing-times.' || robots.name || '.' || times.check_method "key", cast(times.processing_time as text) "value", robots_configurations.configuration_id configuration_id from config.robots robots join config.robots_configurations on robots.id = robots_configurations.robot_id join config.configurations on robots_configurations.configuration_id = configurations.id and configurations.application = 'ppm' join config.processing_times times on robots.id = times.robot_id ) select conf.application application, conf.profile profile, conf.label "label", g_props.key "key", g_props.value "value" from config.configurations conf join config.global_properties g_props on conf.id = g_props.configuration_id union select conf.application application, conf.profile profile, conf.label "label", robots_properties.key "key", robots_properties.value "value" from config.configurations conf join robots_properties on conf.id = robots_properties.configuration_id
